name: Wake County Public School System
about: Wake County Public School System serves approximately 161,000 students in the Raleigh-Durham metropolitan area and is the largest school district in North Carolina.
calendarNotes: Wake County Public School System typically starts the school year in late August. Spring Break falls in late March to early April. Note that WCPSS operates multiple calendar tracks: most students follow the Traditional calendar, while a small number of magnet and early-college high schools use a separate schedule with different start and end dates. Wake County is one of the fastest-growing school districts in the country, driven by the Research Triangle's technology and life sciences economy, and attendance boundaries are periodically adjusted to accommodate new development. Families new to the Raleigh-Durham area should confirm their assigned school before assuming based on address.
